mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ForumDAO.selectForum 설명 : 토론정보조회(1건) */ SELECT DSCS_ID , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_ID , LRN_GRP_ID , DELYN , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOK_CFGYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_OYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND DELYN = 'N'
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : ForumDAO.insertForum 설명 : 토론등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS ( DSCS_ID , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_ID , LRN_GRP_ID , DELYN , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOK_CFGYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_OYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , SBJCT_ID ) VALUES ( #{dscsId} , #{dscsGrpId} , '' , #{dscsUnitTycd} , #{evlScrTycd} , #{dscsTtl} , #{dscsCts} , #{dscsSdttm} , #{dscsEdttm} , #{dvclsId} , #{lrnGrpId} , NVL(#{delyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oatclInqyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokCfgyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokrtOyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokModyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mltOpnnRegyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokRgtrOyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{cmntRspnsReqyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mrkRfltyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mrkOyn}, 'N') , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , FN_DTTM() , #{sbjctId} )

/* SQL ID : ForumDAO.copyForum 설명 : 기존토론을 신규 토론으로 복사 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS ( DSCS_ID , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_ID , LRN_GRP_ID , DELYN , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_OYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , SBJCT_ID ) SELECT #{dscsId} , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_ID , LRN_GRP_ID , 'N' , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_OYN , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , FN_DTTM() , #{sbjctId} FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = #{copydscsId}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ForumDAO.deleteForum 설명 : 토론 삭제(논리삭제) */ UPDATE TB_LMS_DSCS SET DELYN = 'Y' , MDFR_ID = NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId}
